name: Arnold Press
setup: Sit on bench with back support
Dumbbells in front of shoulders, palms facing you
execution: Rotate palms outward as you press overhead
At top, palms face forward, arms extended overhead
Reverse: rotate palms toward you as you lower
Return to start with elbows together
cues: Elbows to front at bottom, elbows to sides at top
advantages: Great for shoulder health and mobility
